Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

This can probably be abandoned.

Patch Set 1:

I'm using this to figure out Oleg's setup for accounts.

Patch Set 1:

I've added some extra debugging to the ACL patch, and it looks like his system has duplicate IDs/users/groups:

 was USER0=lustreuser:x:500:500:Oleg Drokin:/home/lustreuser:/bin/bash
 was USER1=user1:x:501:501::/home/user1:/bin/bash
           sanityusr1:x:501:501::/home/sanityusr1:/bin/bash
 now USER0=sanityusr=500:500, USER1=sanityusr1=501:501

and I think "sanityusr" actually uses "500:501".  rather than trying to handle this strange situation, I've just asked him to change sanityusr to use "500:500".

Abandoned

Andreas has a fix so no need for debug patch.

commit.subject: LU-0000 tests: quota user setup
commit.message:
LU-0000 tests: quota user setup

See how maloo handles "user" accounts.
